title: Front Office Manager - SpiceJet - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - SpiceJet - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
SpiceJet is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Jodhpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About SpiceJet:
SpiceJet is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SpiceJet!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
